summary: Both prior runtime-contract findings are resolved at frozen HEAD 6d678a1ae53844703e3c42085b9eddbbbc89ca32: the public guarded Run command path now proves persisted run, same-Run resume, human status rendering, and operator cancellation in a real Git fixture, and target architecture conformance was regenerated and independently rerun at the exact HEAD with 80 violations versus the current origin/main baseline of 81.
inspection_evidence: .vibepro/qa/one-command-runtime-e2e.json records 5/5 at strict HEAD 6d678a1ae53844703e3c42085b9eddbbbc89ca32; independent rerun of the E2E file passed 5/5 including S-004; .vibepro/qa/one-command-conformance-6d678a1a.json and an independent exact-HEAD conformance rerun report 80 violations, while origin/main 236937dfe33eb407f912086d54bfbd3d7d699874 remains the recorded 81-violation baseline.
judgment_delta: Prior needs_changes finding runtime-e2e-matrix-does-not-cross-guarded-run-boundary -> resolved because S-004 invokes the actual runCli command router against a real Git repository and persists one guarded Run through execute run, execute resume, execute status human rendering, and execute cancel; the path-specific S-002 producer matrix and existing guarded-run tests compose with this shared public transport proof rather than relying only on direct owner calls.

Concern that importing runCli might still be an isolated unit simulation -> rejected because bin/vibepro.js is a thin delegating entrypoint to the same exported runCli composition root, and S-004 crosses CLI parsing, run-session orchestration, filesystem persistence, reload, rendering, transition journal, and cancellation boundaries with assertions that the previous direct-owner test could not satisfy.

Prior needs_changes finding current-head-conformance-evidence-is-stale -> resolved because the 6d678a1a-named artifact was produced after the frozen commit and the conformance command was independently rerun while git rev-parse HEAD returned 6d678a1ae53844703e3c42085b9eddbbbc89ca32; both results report 80 violations with no regression from the current origin/main baseline of 81.

Regression concern about reverse CLI ownership or duplicated predecessor implementations -> rejected because production run-session modules have no import of src/cli.js, CLI remains the outer composition adapter, and existing createProductionRuntimeCoordinator and createIndependentReviewActionRunner owners are composed rather than reimplemented.

regression_guard.detail: Strict-HEAD verification records E2E 5/5, integration 4/4, unit 254/254, and typecheck pass. The added commit changes only the E2E test surface. The exact-HEAD conformance rerun remains at 80 violations versus origin/main's 81, and production authority boundaries, legacy fallback, connector ownership, and independent-review ownership remain unchanged.

path_surface_coverage.detail: The producer matrix covers success, decision, verification failure, repair/no-progress, quota, timeout, CI pending, and cancellation outcomes, while S-004 proves their shared guarded transport surface through public CLI routing, persisted state.json, same-run resume and retry journal, JSON results, human status output, next-command rendering, and terminal operator cancellation. Runtime-specific recovery fields remain separately asserted in guarded-run and adapter tests.
